category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a wrapper library for evdev devices; freedesktop libevdev page describes it as wrapping Linux evdev ioctls.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libevdev; official freedesktop page title is libevdev.
docs_sources: Official freedesktop libevdev page links API documentation for current and previous releases and is the project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official freedesktop libevdev page lists git repository https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libevdev/libevdev.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and freedesktop documentation identify libevdev as a C library for Linux evdev/input devices.
